metadata.title: SultanaExpress — B2B Marketplace for Turkish Manufacturers
metadata.description: SultanaExpress: B2B marketplace connecting international buyers with verified Turkish textile manufacturers. RFQ system, quote comparison, real-time messaging, order tracking. Free registration.

hero.subtitle: The B2B marketplace purpose-built for textile sourcing from Turkey. Filter by GSM, fiber composition, and certifications. Compare quotes side by side. Track orders from factory floor to your warehouse. Free for buyers, always.

problem.title: International B2B Sourcing Is Broken
problem.subtitle: Finding reliable suppliers in Turkey means endless trade shows, cold emails that go unanswered, language barriers, and zero transparency on pricing. Both sides deserve better.
problem.buyerDesc: You fly to Istanbul, visit showrooms, collect business cards — and still have no way to verify quality, pricing, or reliability before placing an order.
problem.supplierDesc: Trade shows cost thousands. B2B platforms charge exorbitant listing fees. And even after paying, there's no guarantee that qualified buyers will find your products.
problem.bothDesc: Pricing is opaque. Communication is fragmented across email, WhatsApp, and phone. There's no single platform to manage the entire procurement cycle.

features.title: From Discovery to Delivery, All in One Place
features.subtitle: SultanaExpress handles everything from discovery to delivery. Browse verified suppliers, request quotes, negotiate terms, place orders, and track shipments — all in one place.
features.verifiedDesc: Every supplier undergoes factory audits, document verification, and financial assessment. Performance tiers reflect proven track records.
features.rfqDesc: Create detailed Requests for Quote with textile-specific fields — fiber composition, GSM weight, certifications. Receive quotes and compare them with automatic scoring.
features.messagingDesc: Built-in messaging with file attachments, read receipts, and typing indicators. Every conversation is linked to its RFQ or order for full context.
features.comparisonDesc: Compare quotes from multiple suppliers across price, delivery time, payment terms, and quality certifications. Weighted scoring highlights the best match.
features.trackingDesc: Track every order from confirmation through production, shipping, and delivery. Upload and access invoices, packing lists, and certificates in one place.
features.analyticsDesc: Buyers see spending trends, supplier performance, and order history. Suppliers see revenue analytics, product performance, and market demand signals.

whyTurkey.title: Why Smart Buyers Are Choosing Turkey
whyTurkey.subtitle: Turkey exported $255 billion in goods in 2023, making it the world's 7th largest apparel exporter. Its Customs Union with the EU means zero tariffs, shorter shipping, and competitive pricing.
whyTurkey.tariffDesc: Industrial goods move between Turkey and the EU with zero customs duties — lower costs, fewer delays, simplified documentation compared to Asia.
whyTurkey.deliveryDesc: Turkey sits at the crossroads of Europe and Asia. Shipments reach European destinations in 2–5 days by road, compared to 25–40 days from China by sea.
whyTurkey.factoriesDesc: Turkey's textile industry spans the full value chain — fiber production to finished garments — with internationally recognized certifications like OEKO-TEX, GOTS, and ISO 9001.

forBuyers.title: Find the Right Supplier in Minutes, Not Months
forBuyers.subtitle: Whether you're a boutique owner sourcing 500 t-shirts or a retail chain ordering 50,000 meters of fabric, SultanaExpress gives you direct access to Turkey's best manufacturers.
items: Browse thousands of products across textiles, fashion, accessories, and home goods
Filter by fabric composition, GSM weight, MOQ, certifications, and more
Create detailed RFQs with textile-specific specifications
Receive and compare multiple quotes with automatic scoring
Negotiate directly with suppliers through built-in messaging
Track orders from confirmation to doorstep delivery
Save favorites and build curated supplier collections
forBuyers.cta: Start Sourcing Free — No Credit Card Required

forSuppliers.title: Reach 25+ Countries Without Leaving Your Workshop
forSuppliers.subtitle: Join a growing network of Turkish manufacturers connecting with qualified international buyers. List your products, receive quote requests, and grow your export business.
items: Create a verified supplier profile showcasing your capabilities and certifications
List products with detailed specifications, tiered pricing, and sample availability
Receive qualified RFQs from verified buyers — no cold outreach needed
Submit quotes with built-in calculators for pricing, shipping, and lead times
Manage orders with status tracking, document upload, and payment monitoring
Access analytics showing product views, inquiry rates, and market trends
Earn higher visibility through performance tiers (Bronze to Platinum)

howItWorks.title: From Sign-Up to First Order in Under a Week
howItWorks.subtitle: Get up and running in minutes, not days.

steps.desc: Sign up free in under 2 minutes. Tell us about your business and what you're looking for.

mobileApp.title: Your Supply Chain in Your Pocket
mobileApp.subtitle: SultanaExpress has dedicated iOS and Android apps for both buyers and suppliers. Get push notifications for new quotes, manage orders from anywhere, and communicate with partners in real time.

Receive push notifications when quotes arrive
Browse your favorite suppliers and products offline
Set price alerts for products you're watching

supplierFeatures: Manage your product catalog with photo capture
Respond to RFQs directly from your phone
Update order status and upload shipping documents on the go
View sales analytics and market intelligence

trust.verifiedDesc: Every manufacturer undergoes document verification, business registration checks, and capability assessment. Performance tiers reward consistent quality.
trust.certDesc: We prioritize suppliers with internationally recognized certifications that matter in textiles.
trust.secureDesc: GDPR-compliant data handling. Encrypted communications. Secure payment processing. Your data and transactions are protected at every step.

faq.title: Everything You Need to Know Before Getting Started

items.question: What is SultanaExpress?
items.answer: SultanaExpress is a B2B marketplace that connects international buyers with verified Turkish manufacturers and suppliers, with a primary focus on textiles, fashion, and related industries. The platform handles the entire procurement cycle from product discovery to delivery tracking.

items.question: Is it free to sign up?
items.answer: Yes. Registration is completely free for both buyers and suppliers. Buyers can browse products, search suppliers, and create up to 3 RFQs per month at no cost. A 5% commission applies only when a transaction is completed through the platform.

items.question: How are suppliers verified?
items.answer: Every supplier undergoes a multi-step verification process that includes business registration document review, tax ID verification, capability assessment, and optional factory audit. Suppliers earn performance tiers (Bronze through Platinum) based on their transaction history, response times, and buyer ratings.

items.question: What industries do you cover?
items.answer: Our primary focus is textiles and fashion — apparel, fabrics, accessories, and home textiles. We also serve machinery, electronics, agricultural products, and furniture. The platform includes textile-specific features like fiber composition tracking, GSM specifications, and certification management.

items.question: Which countries do you serve?
items.answer: SultanaExpress is available to buyers worldwide. Our logistics partner Yusen Logistics operates in 47 countries and 372 cities. The platform currently supports English, Turkish, German, French, and Italian.

items.question: How does the RFQ system work?
items.answer: Buyers create a Request for Quote with detailed product specifications — quantity, quality requirements, delivery timeline, and budget. The RFQ is sent to relevant suppliers who respond with detailed quotes. Buyers can compare quotes side by side using our scoring matrix, negotiate terms, and accept the best offer — all within the platform.

items.question: Is there a mobile app?
items.answer: Yes! Native iOS and Android apps for both buyers and suppliers are available. The mobile apps include push notifications, offline support, barcode scanning, and all the core features of the web platform.

items.question: What are the minimum order quantities?
items.answer: MOQs vary by supplier and product. Each product listing includes the supplier's minimum order quantity. Many suppliers offer sample orders at smaller quantities before committing to bulk purchases.

items.question: How do payments work? Is there escrow protection?
items.answer: SultanaExpress provides escrow payment protection for all transactions. Funds are held securely until the buyer confirms receipt and quality of goods. This protects both parties and builds trust.

items.question: What if I receive defective goods?
items.answer: Our dispute resolution process protects buyers. If goods don't match the agreed specifications, you can open a dispute. Our team mediates between buyer and supplier to reach a fair resolution, including refunds when warranted.

items.question: Can I request samples before ordering?
items.answer: Absolutely. Most suppliers offer product samples. You can request samples directly through the platform before committing to a bulk order. Sample availability and pricing are listed on each product page.

items.question: Do you handle customs and import duties?
items.answer: Our logistics partner Yusen Logistics handles the shipping process. For EU buyers, Turkey's Customs Union means zero tariffs on most industrial goods. For non-EU destinations, our team can help navigate customs requirements and documentation.

bottomCta.title: Start Sourcing Smarter Today
bottomCta.subtitle: Join SultanaExpress today and start connecting with verified Turkish suppliers. Free registration, no credit card required, and your first three RFQs are on us.
bottomCta.buyerDesc: Find quality Turkish products at competitive prices.
bottomCta.supplierDesc: Reach qualified international buyers and grow your exports.

footer.tagline: The premier B2B marketplace connecting global buyers with Turkish manufacturers and suppliers.

pricingPage.metaDescription: Free registration for buyers and suppliers. Premium plans coming soon with AI-powered features.
pricingPage.title: Choose the Plan That Fits Your Business
pricingPage.subtitle: Free registration for both buyers and suppliers. Premium plans with pricing details coming soon.

items.question: Can I switch plans at any time?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, the new features take effect immediately. When downgrading, you'll keep your current features until the end of your billing cycle.

items.question: When will paid plan pricing be announced?
items.answer: We're finalizing pricing for our Growth and Enterprise plans. Join the waitlist to be the first to know when they launch, and to lock in early-adopter rates.

items.question: What AI features are included?
items.answer: Growth plans include AI-powered message translation so you can communicate with suppliers in any language. Enterprise adds AI-generated product descriptions and SEO optimization.

items.question: Are there any hidden fees?
items.answer: No hidden fees whatsoever. The Starter plan is completely free. Paid plan costs will be transparent and clearly communicated before launch.

aboutPage.metaDescription: Learn about SultanaExpress — the B2B marketplace bridging Turkish manufacturing with the world.
aboutPage.title: Bridging Turkish Manufacturing with the World
aboutPage.subtitle: We're building the infrastructure that makes international B2B trade simple, transparent, and accessible for everyone.
aboutPage.missionP1: SultanaExpress was founded with a simple but ambitious goal: to eliminate the friction in international B2B sourcing from Turkey. We believe that every manufacturer — regardless of size — deserves access to global markets, and every buyer deserves transparent, reliable sourcing options.
aboutPage.missionP2: Turkey is one of the world's great manufacturing powerhouses, with over 10,000 textile factories alone, a Customs Union agreement with the EU, and a strategic geographic position bridging Europe and Asia. Yet connecting with Turkish suppliers has traditionally required trade show visits, cold outreach, and navigating language barriers with no guarantee of quality or reliability.

privacyPage.metaDescription: SultanaExpress Privacy Policy — how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content:
SultanaExpress ("Company", "we", "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our B2B marketplace platform ("Platform").

We comply with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), the Turkish Law on Personal Data Protection (KVKK), and other applicable data protection laws.

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
sections.content:
**2.1 Information You Provide**

- **Account Information:** Name, email address, phone number, company name, job title, and business address
- **Profile Information:** Company description, product categories, certifications, and business capabilities
- **Transaction Data:** RFQ details, quotes, order information, and payment records
- **Communications:** Messages exchanged through the Platform, support requests, and feedback
- **Verification Documents:** Business registration, tax ID, and certification documents (for suppliers)

**2.2 Information Collected Automatically**

- **Usage Data:** Pages visited, features used, search queries, and interaction patterns
- **Device Information:** Browser type, operating system, device identifiers, and IP address
- **Cookies:** Session cookies, preference cookies, and analytics cookies

sections.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
sections.content:
We use collected information for the following purposes:

- **Platform Operation:** To provide, maintain, and improve the Platform's features and services
- **Account Management:** To create and manage your account, verify your identity, and process transactions
- **Communication:** To send transactional notifications, respond to inquiries, and provide support
- **Matching:** To connect buyers with relevant suppliers based on product categories and requirements
- **Analytics:** To understand usage patterns, generate market insights, and improve user experience
- **Security:** To detect and prevent fraud, abuse, and unauthorized access
- **Legal Compliance:** To comply with applicable laws, regulations, and legal processes

sections.title: 4. Legal Basis for Processing (GDPR)
sections.content:
We process personal data based on the following legal grounds:

- **Contract Performance:** Processing necessary to provide our services
- **Legitimate Interests:** Processing necessary for our business interests where not overridden by your rights
- **Consent:** Where you have given specific consent (marketing communications, non-essential cookies)
- **Legal Obligation:** Processing required by applicable laws

sections.title: 5. Information Sharing
sections.content:
We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with:

- **Other Users:** Your public profile, product listings, and business information are visible to other Platform users
- **Service Providers:** Third-party providers who assist with hosting, analytics, payment processing, and logistics
- **Legal Requirements:** When required by law, regulation, or legal process
- **Business Transfers:** In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets

sections.title: 6. Data Retention
sections.content:
We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide our services. After account termination:

- Transaction records are retained for 7 years for legal and accounting purposes
- Communication logs are retained for 2 years
- Usage data is anonymized after 1 year
- You may request earlier deletion of your personal data (subject to legal retention requirements)

sections.title: 7. Your Rights
sections.content:
Under GDPR and KVKK, you have the right to:

- **Access:** Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
- **Rectification:** Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data
- **Erasure:** Request deletion of your personal data
- **Restriction:** Request restriction of processing in certain circumstances
- **Portability:** Request your data in a structured, machine-readable format
- **Objection:** Object to processing based on legitimate interests
- **Withdraw Consent:** Withdraw previously given consent at any time

To exercise these rights, contact us at sc@sultana.express. We will respond within 30 days.

sections.title: 8. Cookies
sections.content:
We use cookies and similar technologies:

- **Essential Cookies:** Required for Platform functionality
- **Preference Cookies:** Remember your settings
- **Analytics Cookies:** Understand how users interact with the Platform

You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

sections.title: 9. Data Security
sections.content:
We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures:

- Encryption of data in transit (TLS/SSL) and at rest
- Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments
- Access controls and authentication requirements
- Employee training on data protection practices

sections.title: 10. International Data Transfers
sections.content: Your data may be transferred to countries outside your country of residence. We ensure appropriate safeguards including Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) and data processing agreements with all service providers.

sections.title: 11. Children's Privacy
sections.content: The Platform is intended for business use and is not directed at individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.

sections.title: 12. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email or Platform notification.

sections.title: 13. Contact Us
sections.content:
For privacy-related questions, requests, or complaints:

- Email: sc@sultana.express
- Address: Istanbul, Turkey

termsPage.metaDescription: SultanaExpress Terms of Service — rules and guidelines for using our B2B marketplace platform.
termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using the SultanaExpress platform.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content:
By accessing or using the SultanaExpress platform ("Platform"), operated by SultanaExpress ("Company", "we", "us"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not use the Platform.

These Terms apply to all users of the Platform, including buyers, suppliers, and visitors.

sections.title: 2. Description of Service
sections.content:
SultanaExpress is a B2B marketplace that connects international buyers with Turkish manufacturers and suppliers. The Platform provides supplier discovery, RFQ management, quote comparison, messaging, order management, and analytics.

SultanaExpress acts as a marketplace facilitator. We do not manufacture, sell, or ship products ourselves.

sections.title: 3. Account Registration
sections.content:
To use certain features, you must register an account. You agree to:

- Provide accurate, current, and complete registration information
- Maintain and update your information to keep it accurate
- Keep your login credentials confidential and secure
- Accept responsibility for all activities under your account
- Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use

sections.title: 4. Supplier Verification
sections.content:
SultanaExpress conducts verification procedures for suppliers. However:

- Verification does not constitute a guarantee of product quality, delivery, or business practices
- Performance tiers reflect historical metrics and are not endorsements
- Buyers are responsible for their own due diligence

sections.title: 5. Fees and Commissions
sections.content: SultanaExpress offers free and paid subscription tiers. The Starter tier is free. Pricing for Growth and Enterprise tiers will be announced soon. We reserve the right to modify pricing with 30 days' advance notice.

sections.title: 6. User Conduct
sections.content:
You agree not to:

- Use the Platform for any unlawful purpose
- Submit false or misleading information
- Interfere with Platform operation
- Circumvent Platform fees by conducting transactions outside the Platform
- Scrape or harvest data without authorization
- Impersonate another person or entity
- Upload malicious code or content

sections.title: 7. Intellectual Property
sections.content: The Platform is owned by SultanaExpress and protected by intellectual property laws. Content you submit remains your property, but you grant SultanaExpress a non-exclusive license to use, display, and distribute it on the Platform.

sections.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: SultanaExpress is a marketplace facilitator. We are not liable for the quality, safety, or legality of products listed on the Platform, the accuracy of listings, or the ability of parties to perform their obligations. Our total liability shall not exceed the fees you paid in the 12 months preceding the claim.

sections.title: 9. Dispute Resolution
sections.content: SultanaExpress may offer mediation services for disputes between buyers and suppliers but is not obligated to do so. Disputes between you and SultanaExpress shall be governed by the laws of the Republic of Turkey and resolved in the courts of Istanbul.

sections.title: 10. Termination
sections.content: You may terminate your account at any time. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the Platform ceases, outstanding obligations remain due, and data may be retained as required by law.

sections.title: 11. Modifications to Terms
sections.content: We may update these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be communicated at least 30 days before taking effect. Continued use constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

sections.title: 12. Contact
sections.content:
For questions about these Terms:

- Email: sc@sultana.express
- Address: Istanbul, Turkey

cookiesPage.metaDescription: SultanaExpress Cookie Policy — how we use cookies and similar technologies.
cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.subtitle: How we use cookies and similar technologies on our platform.

sections.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
sections.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the website remember your preferences and improve your experience.

sections.title: 2. Cookies We Use
sections.content:
**Essential Cookies** — Required for the Platform to function properly. These include session management, authentication, and security cookies. You cannot opt out of essential cookies.

**Preference Cookies** — Remember your settings such as language preference, display options, and region. These enhance your experience but are not strictly necessary.

**Analytics Cookies** — Help us understand how visitors use our Platform. We use this data to improve our services. Analytics data is aggregated and anonymized.

**Marketing Cookies** — Used to deliver relevant advertisements and track campaign effectiveness. We only use marketing cookies with your explicit consent.

sections.title: 3. Managing Cookies
sections.content:
You can manage your cookie preferences through:

- **Browser Settings:** Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies
- **Our Cookie Banner:** Displayed on your first visit, allowing you to choose which non-essential cookies to accept

Note: Disabling essential cookies may affect Platform functionality.

sections.title: 4. Third-Party Cookies
sections.content: Some cookies are placed by third-party services we use, including analytics providers and payment processors. These are governed by the respective third party's privacy policy.

sections.title: 5. Updates to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. The "Last updated" date reflects the most recent revision.

sections.title: 6. Contact
sections.content:
For questions about our use of cookies:

- Email: sc@sultana.express
- Address: Istanbul, Turkey
